creator: discipline@tiscali.it
text:
After upgrading x11/libmatekbd (https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=8b120aa5b56444590b8b93416fa20ead05ded2be)
$ ldd /usr/local/lib/mate-settings-daemon/libkeyboard.so | grep libmatekbd
	libmatekbdui.so.4 => not found (0)
	libmatekbd.so.4 => not found (0)
$ pkg which /usr/local/lib/mate-settings-daemon/libkeyboard.so
/usr/local/lib/mate-settings-daemon/libkeyboard.so was installed by package mate-settings-daemon-1.28.0_1
